description: This file defines a single asynchronous function generateStaticParams used for static site generation in a Next.js application. It provides static parameters for dynamic routing, returning an empty array to indicate no pre-rendered params, with runtime fetching handled on the client side.

methods.name: export async function generateStaticParams(): Promise<Array<{ id: string }>> { generateStaticParams
methods.description: Asynchronously generates static parameters for dynamic routes, returning an empty array to allow runtime data fetching on the client side.

ctags.name: generateStaticParams
ctags.pattern: /^export async function generateStaticParams(): Promise<Array<{ id: string }>> {$/
